title: Symmetric Key Encryption Algorithm Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the step-by-step process of a symmetric encryption algorithm like AES, showing how plaintext is transformed into ciphertext and back.
relationships: Plaintext Input is processed by Encryption Algorithm using Encryption Key to produce Ciphertext Output
Ciphertext Output is processed by Decryption Algorithm using the same Encryption Key to produce Decrypted Plaintext Output
